---
title: Liet
---

# Liet

Liet is an iPhone batch image pre-processing app for resizing images and
removing backgrounds in batches.

## Highlights

- Batch resize multiple images with shared long-edge and compression settings.
- Remove backgrounds in batches and export transparent PNG copies.
- Import images from Photos or Files.
- Save processed results to Files or Photos.
- Process selected images on device without requiring an account or cloud
  sync.

## Privacy

Liet 1.0 is designed around local processing. The app works only with images
that you explicitly select, and it requests Photo Library access only when you
choose to save processed results back to Photos.

Read the [Privacy Policy](privacy.html).
